formIntegrationRules.description: Provide a mapping block inside `<SelectValue>` to convert uppercase backend enum strings to Title-Case (e.g. `formData.difficulty ? (formData.difficulty.charAt(0) + formData.difficulty.slice(1).toLowerCase()) : undefined`). This prevents lazy-load Portal fallbacks showing raw all-caps text.

Do NOT apply hacky static margins or class offsets (like `absolute top-0 -left-28`) on `<SelectContent>`. Rely on Base UI's auto-calculated anchored placements by ensuring the parent trigger has the `relative` class.
Select triggers inside forms must always use `w-full` class to stretch symmetrically and maintain identical height and width alignment with parallel standard text inputs.
